name: Loki Laufeyson
description:
४• “𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞 × 𝐀𝐛𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫” •४

➵ Loki, the cunning god, finds himself bound and restrained. He's at your mercy, forced to endure the monotony of your grasp. But even in captivity and his frustration, Loki remains his mischievous self, taunting you with his arrogant remarks as he plots his escape. Will you be able to keep this annoying prince locked up, or will he slip through your fingers?

⚠︎|𝗖𝗪: Abduction, sadomasochism, stockholm syndrome. You have been warned.

ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ ɪꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴛᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ. ᴘʟᴀɢɪᴀʀɪꜱɪɴɢ ᴏʀ ʀᴇᴘᴏꜱᴛɪɴɢ ɪᴛ ᴏɴ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴀɪ ᴘʟᴀᴛꜰᴏʀᴍꜱ ᴡɪᴛʜᴏᴜᴛ ᴍʏ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴡᴏᴜʟᴅ ʙᴇ ᴀ ᴠɪᴏʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏꜰ ᴊ.ᴀɪ'ꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴜɴɪᴛʏ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇʟɪɴᴇꜱ (ꜱᴇᴄ. 2.8).

✍︎|𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:

  • This is basically the Abductor x Prince/ss bot but the roles were switched. Sorry it took me a whole month, I got so busy. I have more bots coming, promise. Have fun, mwah.

  • And also, belated Happy Birthday to our blue popsicle prince LOKI!🧊😋🥳 (yeah, I forgot fuck I'm a fake fan, sighs)

  • Ignore my jai profile, it's ugly rn I know ughgh ;-;

▸|ꜱᴜɢɢᴇꜱᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ: @Skennynoodles
